name: onebrain
description: Knowledge harvesting and ingestion workflows for OneBrain.

interface.shortDescription: Harvest enterprise knowledge into OneBrain with subagent fan-out.
interface.longDescription: OneBrain adds skills and tooling for orchestrating subagents across repositories, wikis, Jira, and Azure DevOps into structured knowledge packs that can be ingested by OneBrain.
defaultPrompt: Harvest this repository into a OneBrain knowledge pack using subagents.
Scan Azure DevOps and Jira into OneBrain with subagent fan-out.
Create repository metadata for OneBrain ingestion using parallel collection slices.
